testcase.name: addTask should add a task with default priority
addTask should assign incrementing ids
completeTask should mark task as done
completeTask should return false for non-existent id
filterByPriority should return only tasks matching the priority
completionPercentage should return 50 when half are done
completionPercentage should return 0 when none are done
searchTasks should find tasks case-insensitively
sortTasks should sort by priority then title
getTasks should return a copy of tasks
jest_javascript

failure.message: npm warn exec The following package was not found and will be installed: jest@30.3.0 npm warn deprecated inflight@1.0.6: This module is not supported, and leaks memory. Do not use it. Check out lru-cache if you want a good and tested way to coalesce async requests by a key value, which is much more comprehensive and powerful. npm warn deprecated glob@7.2.3: Old versions of glob are not supported, and contain widely publicized security vulnerabilities, which have been fixed in the current version

testcase.failure: npm warn exec The following package was not found and will be installed: jest@30.3.0 npm warn deprecated inflight@1.0.6: This module is not supported, and leaks memory. Do not use it. Check out lru-cache if you want a good and tested way to coalesce async requests by a key value, which is much more comprehensive and powerful. npm warn deprecated glob@7.2.3: Old versions of glob are not supported, and contain widely publicized security vulnerabilities, which have been fixed in the current version. Please update. Support for old versions may be purchased (at exorbitant rates) by contacting i@izs.me npm warn deprecated glob@10.5.0: Old versions of glob are not supported, and contain widely publicized security vulnerabilities, which have been fixed in the current version. Please update. Support for old versions may be purchased (at exorbitant rates) by contacting i@izs.me npm warn cleanup Failed to remove some directories [ npm warn cleanup [ npm warn cleanup '/Users/I074560/.npm/_np

testcase.name: addTask should add a task with default priority
addTask should assign incrementing ids
completeTask should mark task as done
completeTask should return false for non-existent id
filterByPriority should return only tasks matching the priority
completionPercentage should return 50 when half are done
completionPercentage should return 0 when none are done
searchTasks should find tasks case-insensitively
sortTasks should sort by priority then title
getTasks should return a copy of tasks
jest_typescript

failure.message: npm warn exec The following package was not found and will be installed: jest@30.3.0 npm warn deprecated inflight@1.0.6: This module is not supported, and leaks memory. Do not use it.
